mailOptions.subject: [EFP-PSO] 📤 Employee Transfer Request - Action Required
mailOptions.text:
An employee transfer request has been initiated from your organization.

👤 Employee Details:
• Name: Tolashe Bulcha Girma
• Fayida ID: 121314151630
• Current Organization: Eagle Security plc
• Destination Organization: Vital Security PLC
• Transfer Reason: becuase we him and he he said i haved released my organization work

⏱️ Timeline:
• Status: PENDING - Awaiting your approval
• Action Required: RELEASE or REJECT the transfer
• Deadline: 7 business days

📋 Next Steps:
1. Review the employee's current performance and record
2. Approve (RELEASE) or reject the transfer request
3. Provide feedback if rejection is necessary

Please log in to the HR Management portal to take action.

ከ ድርጅትዎ የሰራተኛ ሰ ዋደ ጥያቄ ጀምርዋል።

👤 የሰራተኛ ዝርዝር:
• ስም: Tolashe Bulcha Girma
• ፋይዳ ቁጥር: 121314151630
• ወቅታዊ ድርጅት: ንስር የጥበቃ አገልግሎት::
• የሚገባ ድርጅት: ቫይታል ሴኪዩሪቲ ኃ/የተ/የግ/ማህበር
• የሰራተኛ ሰ ዋደ ምክንያት: becuase we him and he he said i haved released my organization work

⏱️ ጊዜ:
• ሁኔታ: ተጠብቆ ነበር - ለ ማጽደቅ ይጠብቃል
• ተግባር: ሰ ዋደውን ሩብ ወይም ውድቅ ያድርጉ
• ወሳኝ ቀን: 7 ሥራ ቀናት

📋 ቀጣይ ደረጃዎች:
1. የሰራተኛውን ወቅታዊ አፈፃፀም እና ዝርዝር ይገምግሙ
2. ሰ ዋደውን ይፈቅዱ (RELEASE) ወይም ውድቅ ያድርጉ
3. ውድቅ ከሆነ ግብረመልስ ያቅርቡ

እባክዎ ተግባር ለ ማድረግ ወደ HR ሥራ ሰራዊት ወንጌል ይግቡ።
